tasks.label: Find Node.js path
tasks.command: cmd /c "where node 2>nul & echo --- & where npm 2>nul & echo --- & dir /s /b C:\node.exe 2>nul & echo --- & dir /s /b C:\Users\%USERNAME%\node.exe 2>nul & echo --- & reg query HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Node.js /v InstallPath 2>nul"

tasks.label: Find Node.js via nvm/fnm
tasks.command:
cmd /c "dir /s /b C:\Users\%USERNAME%\AppData\Roaming
vm\*node.exe 2>nul & echo ---nvm--- & dir /s /b C:\Users\%USERNAME%\AppData\Local nm*
ode.exe 2>nul & echo ---fnm--- & dir /s /b C:\Users\%USERNAME%\scoop\apps
odejs*
ode.exe 2>nul & echo ---scoop--- & dir /s /b C:\Users\%USERNAME%\.volta\*node.exe 2>nul & echo ---volta---"

tasks.label: Find Node.js by searching Program Files
tasks.command:
cmd /c "dir /s /b C:\Progra~1
odejs
ode.exe 2>nul & dir /s /b C:\Progra~2
odejs
ode.exe 2>nul & echo DONE"

tasks.label: Find node via PowerShell script
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$nodePath = (Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).Source; $npmPath = (Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).Source; Write-Output \"NODE: $nodePath\"; Write-Output \"NPM: $npmPath\"; Write-Output \"PATH-node: $($env:Path -split ';' | Where-Object { $_ -like '*node*' })\""

tasks.label: Check bash PATH for node
tasks.command: bash -c "echo $PATH | tr ':' '\n' | grep -i node; echo '---'; ls -la /c/Program*Files/nodejs/ 2>/dev/null; echo '---'; which node 2>/dev/null || echo 'not found'"
